design_philosophy.core_loop: Select nation → compete through tournament matches → progress toward World Cup victory
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Match-by-match progression toward championship; tactical team selection and formation
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Lead your nation to World Cup glory; experience the official 1990 tournament with authentic teams
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasizes authentic tournament structure and roster; bird's-eye perspective provides tactical overview rather than arcade action focus

difficulty.checkpointing: Match-based progression; tournament bracket structure allows continued play through tournament
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player agency through team selection (24 playable nations with varying skill levels); no explicit difficulty settings documented

progression.unlock_mechanism: Tournament bracket structure; advancement contingent on match outcomes; official World Cup group stage and knockout format
replayability_hooks: 24 distinct national teams with different playstyles
Multiple tournament runs with different team selections
Multiplayer versus mode for head-to-head competition

world_building_techniques: Official tournament structure mirroring 1990 FIFA World Cup
Authentic national team rosters (excluding Republic of Ireland)
Geographic/national team identity as primary narrative context

faction_indicators: 24 playable nations representing distinct football traditions and regional identities
Team-based gameplay emphasizing national pride and competitive alignment
environmental_storytelling: Tournament bracket visualization showing geopolitical groupings
National team rosters reflecting 1990 squad compositions
Bird's-eye view perspective emphasizing tactical/strategic positioning
